name: Curried Whole Chick Peas (Chole)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chick peas and soak them. Drain well.
2. Add the chick peas to the water with the bay leaf and a small amount of ghee. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 hour.
3. Drain and reserve the liquid.
4. Using a mortar and pestle, grind the cinnamon stick, peppercorns, cardamom, cloves, and cumin seeds.
5. Heat 3 tbsp ghee in a skillet. When hot, stir in the ginger root, chilies, and fry until browned. Remove from heat and sprinkle in the turmeric, paprika, coriander, cayenne, and asafetida. Return to heat and add diced tomato.
6. Stir in salt, chick peas, 1/2 cup of reserved cooking water, and lemon juice. Simmer until the liquid has noticeably thickened.
7. Sprinkle with the crushed spices and serve.
